content.en:
The Lord of the Yuan Gu was furious, and the other Supremes were also very angry.

The Twin Universes Transcendence Plan is their core secret, and even the Children of the Ages don't know about it.

Because once this plan is leaked, if the supremes of this universe make trouble, it may affect their plans, even if it only affects a little, it will definitely not work.

They could not allow the plan to slip through the cracks, otherwise if it failed, wouldn't they have lost their only hope of detachment?

"Lord of the Yuan Gu, we have all made an oath, and it is a natal oath, it is definitely not leaked by us, could it be that they have found some inheritance and know the method of transcendence of the dual universes?"

Jin Guang Tianzun said.

"Hmph, the inheritance I mentioned last time was just to deceive the Supremes of the Ten Thousand Races, where is there such a coincidence that there is a inheritance about the method of Dual Universe Transcendence? However, it is indeed impossible for us Supremes to leak it, and those sons of the era don't know, maybe it is really their luck to find the inheritance of the method of Dual Universe Transcendence. However, we still have to investigate how this matter was leaked. "

The Lord of the Progenitals proposed.

"Well, it must be investigated, otherwise it would be too passive. As far as we know, it is not from the Protoss and the Demon Race, but from one trading city to another, and it seems that someone is selling this inheritance!"

"Stone Dragon Supreme, it's up to you, you're proficient in the Great Dao of Time and Space, you should be able to find out the information of that mysterious person, right?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu looked at one of the Supreme Dao.

The Stone Dragon Supreme is also a very terrifying Supreme, not as strong as the Lord of the Yuan Gu, but not much weaker, and proficient in the Great Dao of Time and Space, and the time talent has reached the super god level, and is one of the most difficult Supremes.

Even if the Lord of the Ancient Dynasty can defeat the Stone Dragon Supreme, he can't kill the Stone Dragon Supreme.

And the Shilong Supreme is definitely the first supreme in terms of tracking and investigation.

"No problem, one day is enough!"

The Stone Dragon Supreme assured.

"Okay, then I'll wait for news from the Stone Dragon Supreme!" said the Lord of the Ancient Ageure.

A day was not long, not even a day, and the Stone Dragon Supreme returned.

After all, the speed of the Stone Dragon Supreme is very fast, far exceeding that of other supremes, if it is other supremes, it is estimated that it will take several days just to travel.

"Shilong Supreme, have you found out?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu asked.

"It's a Tianzun, I don't know the origin, and the other party seems to be involved in the Avenue of Time and the Avenue of Space, evading the exploration of time and space, and disturbing time and space everywhere he goes, even I can't track his location. However, I have already absorbed his breath, and if he reappears, I will definitely be able to recognize it!" said the Stone Dragon Supreme.

"It seems that it was deliberately spread, and if we can't find it for the time being, how can we solve this problem now? The whole universe knows this secret, and we can't kill all the creatures in this universe. "

The Lord of the Yuan Gu sighed.

"Contact that being again, and tell him about the matter, so as not to affect the plan!"

The Golden Light Supreme proposed.

"Good!"

The Supremes nodded.

Bang!!!!!

The Supremes blasted open layers of space and came directly to the cosmic barrier.

Then.

Many Supremes took out a formation altar and tried to contact the outside world.

They can't leave the universe, but that doesn't mean they can't connect with the chaos of the situation.

"I don't know when that being will be able to get over!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu underestimated Dao.

Little by little, time passed.

Three days later.

A phantasm descended on the cosmic barrier, it was a firstborn with two horns, but he couldn't see his face clearly.

But its aura was very terrifying, as soon as it appeared, it caused the vibration of the universe origin, and the infinite universe origin power turned into the eye of the heavenly dao, staring at this illusory shadow.

The two sides have launched a new confrontation on an unknown level, making many Supremes feel like ants.

"Summoning me for something, I can't enter the universe, and this idea can't last long, if there is something, say it quickly!"

Unknown existence of cold channels.

"My lord, the method of transcendence of the dual universe has been leaked, I don't know who leaked it, but it is definitely not me. "

The Lord of the Yuan Gu shuddered.

"Has it been leaked?" the unknown being was silent for a moment, and then said, "It is estimated that the inheritance of that force in the chaos mentioned the method of dual universe transcendence, and it was luckily obtained by the forces of the Thirteenth Age. However, you don't need to worry, the forces in this area are basically contained by the forces behind me, and they can't take care of it, so the dual universe detachment plan will not be affected by the forces in the chaos, you just need to keep the chaos arcana, the chaos arcana is very rare, and you only repair half of it, and the other half is in another universe. In the midst of chaos, there are only a few treasures that can suppress the origin of the universe, and if I lose them, I won't be able to find new ones. You don't let the Origin of the Universe break free, and the plan won't fail, you know?"

"Yes!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu and other supreme beings responded to the Tao.

"My lord, I would like to ask, when will another universe collide?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu asked.

"Wait, the plan of that universe is not as fast as yours, and they have not yet completed the task of suppressing the origin of the universe. Once suppressed, the final plan can be started immediately, and it will only take about 200,000 years for the two universes to collide. And the initial integration of the universe to stability will need to wait for another 100,000 years, after which you can enter the other universe, understand the rules of the other universe, enhance the foundation and luck, and impact the realm of the transcendent!"

"Thank you, sir!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu hurriedly thanked him.

"I can't hold on to this thought, don't summon me if there is nothing big in the future, every time I enter the universe, I need to spend a lot of strength, understand?"

The unknown being was said and vanished.

......

After the unknown existence left, the Lord of the Yuan Gu and other supremes breathed a sigh of relief.

Although they were powerful enough to kill the most powerful supreme in an instant, they were like ants to that being.

After returning to the Yuangu Palace, the other supremes left one by one.

After the supremes of the other forces left, one of the supremes of the Yuangu Hall said, "Hall Master, I always feel that that existence is using us and others, otherwise how could he help us for free?"

"Shut up!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu was furious: "That being is something you can discuss?"

"The hall master forgives the sin, and the subordinates just say it casually!

The Supreme said in horror.

"Forget it, that being doesn't have the ability to spy on the universe yet, otherwise I wouldn't need to wait. However, you are a little bit right, that being must be using me, not only I know this, but other forces are also very aware of this, but even if we are used, we are willing to wait!

"Hall Master, I understand!"

The Supreme bowed his head and said.

"Let's go down, and by the way, investigate the situation of the other races!"

The main road of the Yuangu.
